action.reasoning: Observation: predict.py is truncated with syntax error at line 79 - the file got corrupted. Best test score is 0.6174 from iter 3. I have ~49 min left. Analysis: Must fix predict.py immediately to enable any evaluation. The truncated file means I can't even evaluate existing checkpoints. Decision: Rewrite predict.py completely with robust test.txt finding, TTA, and multi-checkpoint ensemble support. Then submit eval on best.pt (iter 3's 0.6174 checkpoint) and best_3.pt (iter 5's EMA checkpoint).
